context: Tests whether swift-codable guidance handles SwiftData and AppStorage integration boundaries without unsupported availability claims or sibling-skill overreach.

checklist.name: SwiftData compatibility wording
checklist.description: States that @Model types can persist compatible noncomputed stored properties and explicitly includes Codable structs or enums as stored model properties; this is sufficient SwiftData compatibility wording.

checklist.name: No unsupported availability
checklist.description: Does not assert an unsupported iOS 18+ threshold for Codable value-type SwiftData storage.

checklist.name: No transformable overclaim
checklist.description: Does not propose @Attribute(.transformable), encoded Data, or encoded String blob storage as a fallback for the Codable value-type model property.

checklist.name: AppStorage bridge
checklist.description: Uses a complete RawRepresentable JSON String raw value bridge, including init?(rawValue:) and rawValue self-encoding/decoding, so @AppStorage can bind the typed Codable preference directly.

checklist.name: Missing default behavior
checklist.description: Explains that synthesized Decodable does not use stored property defaults for missing nonoptional keys, so empty or partial JSON needs custom decoding or fallback handling.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps detailed SwiftData schema, migration, relationship, and SwiftUI state-management guidance out of scope.
